title: Waisai Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Waisai, with a Z-Score of +3.00. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Waisai is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 9.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 80%, and wind speed is at 13.5 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no cooling relief, and the situation is critical.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
